title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: The foundation of all technical interviews. Master Arrays, Trees, Graphs, and Dynamic Programming.

title: Object-Oriented Programming
description: Understand core concepts like Inheritance, Polymorphism, Encapsulation, and Abstraction.

title: DBMS
description: Learn about ACID properties, Normalization, indexing, and transactions.

title: SQL
description: Master writing complex queries, Joins, Subqueries, and Group By clauses.

title: Operating Systems
description: Understand process management, deadlocks, memory management, and concurrency.

title: Computer Networks
description: Learn the OSI model, TCP/IP, IP addressing, and routing protocols.

title: Software Engineering
description: Familiarize yourself with software architectures and testing methodologies.

title: SDLC & Agile
description: Understand the software development lifecycle and Agile/Scrum practices.

title: Java Fundamentals
description: Brush up on Java syntax, Collections framework, and multi-threading.

title: Python Fundamentals
description: Learn Python basics, list comprehensions, decorators, and data structures.
